reason: Review global architecture red lines, implementation stack, and evidence scope before accepting the registry migration.
Check that source/shared orchestration did not gain stale family-specific semantic branches outside the RVV contract boundary.
Check RVV finite binary family registry authority, selected config, source-kind metadata, and vadd/vsub marker semantics.
Check generated artifacts remain typed extension-op-to-EmitC/intrinsic route and not descriptor-driven source emission.
Check runtime ABI, source-tail authority, selected-plan coherence, and target artifact front-door behavior.
Check focused lit/build/artifact/ssh-rvv evidence expectations and no overclaiming.
